function: () => { const modalBg = document.getElementById('modalBg'); const modalCard = modalBg ? modalBg.querySelector('.modal-card') : null; return { modalBgVisible: modalBg ? !modalBg.classList.contains('hidden') : null, modalBgRect: modalBg ? { x: modalBg.getBoundingClientRect().x, y: modalBg.getBoundingClientRect().y, w: modalBg.getBoundingClientRect().width, h: modalBg.getBoundingClientRect().height } : null, modalBgStyle: modalBg ? { display: getComputedStyle(modalBg).display, position: getComputedStyle(modalBg).position, overflow: getComputedStyle(modalBg).overflow } : null, modalCardRect: modalCard ? { x: modalCard.getBoundingClientRect().x, y: modalCard.getBoundingClientRect().y, w: modalCard.getBoundingClientRect().width, h: modalCard.getBoundingClientRect().height } : null }; }
